prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy demon castle strategy room, warm torchlight, gothic office decor. Ruri Ashshift, a masculine demon strategist with small horn ornaments in a sharp uniform, calmly pivots to guide the practice sword of Ruri Hornvale 022, a masculine royal guard in polished dark armor, downward in a non-lethal disarm. Office-comedy tension, clear hands, no blood, no injury, no text, no watermark.

Continuous cinematic shot in the same Japanese fantasy demon castle strategy room. Ruri Hornvale 022 freezes in comic surprise as Ruri Ashshift maintains a steady, non-lethal hold on the practice weapon, keeping it lowered and safe. Warm torchlight, gothic office props, clear hands, no blood, no injury, no text, no watermark.
